# Overview

This report presents the statistical analysis of the UCI 130-US Hospitals 
Diabetes dataset, covering exploratory data analysis, causal inference, 
and experimental design. The analytical work in this report directly informs 
feature engineering decisions and modeling choices in Part 2.

## Dataset
- **Source:** UCI Machine Learning Repository — Diabetes 130-US Hospitals
- **Analytic sample:** 69,584 encounters after deduplication and exclusion criteria
- **Outcome:** 30-day hospital readmission (binary)
- **Period:** 1999–2008 across 130 US hospitals

## Analytical Components
1. **Exploratory Data Analysis** — outcome distribution, covariate profiles, missingness
2. **Causal Inference** — estimating effect of HbA1c testing on readmission
3. **Experimental Design** — power analysis and experiment design for model deployment
